creator: miwi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Yuri

Portscout guesses based on a few factors and, if it gets a reply to a
GET request for a file that it asked for that it thinks is a 'bigger
number...' 

hhttp://portscout.freebsd.org/info/portscout-portconfig.txt

This information will let you disable portscout, ignore certain
versions, etc.


Martin
